resources.string: Shows today\'s birthdays from your contacts

RelateAI uses this permission to automatically send birthday wishes via WhatsApp on your behalf, exactly as if you typed and sent them yourself. RelateAI only reads WhatsApp screens to find the send button — it never reads your messages.
Never lose contact with the ones who matter.
Relate AI runs seamlessly on your device to help you analyze relationship health, track important events, and write personalized greetings.
Never miss a special moment. Let AI help you nurture your relationships with personalized wishes.
Import your contacts to discover important dates and stay connected with the people who matter.
Generate unique, heartfelt birthday wishes with AI. Each message is personalized for every relationship.
Get notified before important events so you always have time to prepare the perfect message.
Keep track of birthdays, anniversaries, and custom events all in one place.
Monitor your relationship health with insights and suggestions to stay connected.
Start nurturing your connections with AI-powered wishes and smart reminders.
Tap + to log a meaningful moment
e.g. Likes mango lassi; met at college reunion
No memories recorded yet. Add one above to enrich the AI writer.
Could not load the memory vault. Try again.
Could not add the note. Try again.
Could not update the pinned state. Try again.
Could not delete the note. Try again.
Write a note before adding it to the vault.
Memory notes must be 500 characters or fewer.
Track past gifts and get AI suggestions
Tap + to track a gift you\'ve given
Analyze this contact\'s interests and past gifts to suggest three useful ideas within budget.
Run AI suggestions after adding interests, memories, or past gifts for better results.
No gifts recorded yet. Add the first gift to avoid repeats and improve future suggestions.
Could not load gift details. Try again.
Could not save the gift record. Try again.
Could not delete the gift record. Try again.
Could not generate gift suggestions. Try again later.
Contact details are unavailable. Reopen the contact and try again.
Enter a valid cost from 0 to ₹10,000,000.
Gift name, category, and occasion must be 80 characters or fewer.
Gift notes must be 500 characters or fewer.
No upcoming event is available for this contact.
A wish has already been generated for this event.
AI wish generation is disabled in Settings.
Messages already sent for this contact.
Could not load chat history. Try again.
Test message sent to your device.
Feedback saved. Regenerate to apply it.
Template used because AI generation was unavailable.
Edited draft will be saved when approved.
Write a longer message before approval.
Could not load the message. Try again.
AI wish generation is disabled in Settings.
Could not find the contact or event for this message.
e.g. \'Hey! Happy birthday buddy! Hope you have an awesome year ahead directly filled with joy! Cheers\'
e.g. \'Hi Prof! Hope you are doing well. Just wanted to catch up on the research details sometime...\'
e.g., \'Hey everyone! Hope you have an awesome week ahead. Talk soon!\'
Paste samples you have written, separated by double newlines. RelateAI learns your formality, emoji preference, common greetings, and signature expressions.
e.g. Hey buddy! Happy birthday, hope you have a great day.\n\nRespected Sir, wishing you a very happy birthday and a prosperous year ahead.
Recent sent messages were analyzed and saved.
No recent sent messages were available for analysis.
Could not analyze the pasted samples. Review the text and try again.
Could not analyze recent sent messages. Try again later.
Find why AI wishes feel wrong or fail, then fix the exact blocker.
Contact sync failed. Check account access and try again.
Dry run found a setup blocker: %1$s. %2$s
AI generation is ready. This dry run did not create or send messages.
AI generation needs a Gemini API key, signed-in Google account, and enabled AI toggle.
AI test failed. Check connection, API access, and recent activity.
Account access is available for contact sync.
Sign in with Google and grant Contacts access.
Use Firebase auth or add a Gemini API key.
Add %1$d more writing sample(s) so AI can match your tone.
No writing samples found. Messages may sound generic.
No contacts found. Sync contacts before diagnosing generic AI messages.
%1$d of %2$d contacts have nicknames, interests, memories, or notes.
Only %1$d of %2$d contacts have personal details. Generic inputs create generic wishes.
Sync contacts first so AI Doctor can inspect context quality.
Contacts have enough relationship context for specific AI wishes.
%1$d of %2$d contacts may produce generic wishes. Add nicknames, interests, memories, notes, or stronger relationship labels.
Gemini circuit is %1$s after repeated failures.
Gemini circuit has not reported a state yet.
Approval and reminder notifications can be shown.
Enable only if you want automatic WhatsApp sends.
Exact alarm access is disabled by the system.
Daily automation work is not currently scheduled.
%1$d persisted dispatch recovery records need review; %2$d are dead-lettered.
%1$d persisted dispatch recovery records and %2$d in-memory dispatch records need review; %3$d are dead-lettered.
AI Doctor found %1$d setup fix needed
Resolve the required setup items below.
AI works, but quality can improve
Review the warnings below for better results.
Generation, personalization, and automation checks look healthy.
Gemini quota or rate limit was hit. Wait a few minutes, then run Test AI again.
Gemini authentication failed. Check the API key, Firebase auth, and project permissions.
Network access failed. Check the connection and retry the AI test.
AI returned an invalid or empty response. Regenerate once; if it repeats, check recent errors.
AI calls are temporarily paused after repeated failures. Wait a minute, then run Test AI.
Open Accessibility settings and enable RelateAI - Auto WhatsApp. The service only looks for WhatsApp compose and send controls.
Battery optimization is already ignored for RelateAI.
Review OS battery settings if scheduled workers are delayed on this device.
Notifications are used for reminders and approval prompts before messages are sent.
Use SMART_APPROVE, VIP_APPROVE, or ALWAYS_ASK in Settings when you want review before scheduling or sending.

Suggested message:

%1$s

You can edit and approve this in the Messages screen.
RelateAI needs SMS permission to send approved wishes and notification permission to alert you before important moments.
Sign in failed. Please try again.
Google Sign-In is not configured correctly for this build.
Google Sign-In is not configured for this app signing certificate. Add this build\'s SHA-1 in Firebase, download the updated google-services.json, and rebuild.
Could not reach Google Sign-In. Check your connection and try again.
Firebase authentication failed. Check OAuth configuration and try again.
By signing in, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy
Sign out and clear local data?
This action removes RelateAI data from this device.
Contacts, events, messages, memories, gifts, and activity logs on this device will be deleted.
API keys, email settings, automation preferences, and cached database keys will be cleared.
Google and Firebase access will be signed out or revoked where available; external services keep their own data.
Export an encrypted backup first if you may need this data later.
An older unencrypted database was found and moved to protected app storage for support recovery. RelateAI started a fresh encrypted database.
Train AI to match your personal writing style
Diagnose AI failures, generic wishes, and automation setup
Required for AI wish generation. Get yours at makersuite.google.com
Encrypted database import and export. Last backup: %1$s
Your data is derived using your device ID. If you perform a factory reset, you will lose access to your local database. Keep an encrypted backup in a secure external location.
This password encrypts your backup file. You must remember it to restore your data later.
Save an encrypted copy of your data
Restore your data from a backup file
Backup v%1$d from app %2$s contains %3$d restorable records.
Restore mode: replace. Existing local relationship data will be replaced with this backup. Merge restore will be added later.
Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters with an uppercase letter, a number, and a symbol.
Could not create the encrypted backup. Please try again.
Could not write the backup to the selected destination.
Could not read the selected backup file.
This does not look like a valid RelateAI backup file.
The passphrase does not match this backup.
This backup was created by a newer version of RelateAI. Update the app and try again.
Restore failed before any changes were saved. Check the backup file and try again.
RelateAI needs contacts before it can discover events or personalize wishes.
Contact sync is reporting an issue. Open AI Doctor for the exact fix.
Add a Gemini API key or sign in with Google before relying on AI wishes.
AI generation is disabled. Open AI Doctor to review the safest setup path.
%1$d message(s) need review before they can send.
Relationship health is %1$d. Open their profile to add context or prepare a warm check-in.
Protect local relationship data before relying on automation.
Last backup was %1$d days ago. Create a fresh encrypted backup.
Relationship health is %1$d. Add a memory or generate a warm check-in.
Upcoming in %1$d day(s). Check personalization before the wish is generated.
Unable to sync contacts. Please try again.
No events yet. Add one manually or sync your contacts.
No contacts yet. Switch to New to add a local contact.
Unable to load events. Please try again.
Unable to refresh events. Please try again.
Unable to update this event conflict. Please try again.
Choose a contact or enter a new contact name.
%1$s already has %2$s on %3$d/%4$d. Save only if this should be a separate reminder.
%1$s already has %2$s on %3$d/%4$d. You entered %5$d/%6$d. Save anyway only if both reminders are needed.
Search by contact, event, channel, or message
Are you sure you want to reject this message? It will not be sent.
%1$d message(s) have missing contact, channel, or Gmail setup. Fix blockers before retrying.
If setup looks correct, review AI Doctor for recent failures, then retry selected rows.
Retry stays manual after you review the fix.
Unable to load messages. Please try again.
Unable to approve the message. Please try again.
Unable to reject the message. Please try again.
Unable to retry the message. Please try again.
Unable to revoke approval. Please try again.
Unable to approve the selected messages. Please try again.
Unable to reject the selected messages. Please try again.
Unable to retry the selected messages. Please try again.
A failed message was queued for retry.
%1$d failed messages were queued for retry.
Could not export the report. Please try again.
No wishes sent yet this year
Choose SMS, WhatsApp, or Email as the preferred channel.
Set both hour and minute for a custom send time.
Complete these steps for reliable imports, previews, reminders, and automatic sending.
Use Google sign-in for account access and Google Contacts sync.
Sync Google contacts and explicitly allow device contacts from the import action.
Add Gemini access and Gmail sender details before generating or test-sending wishes.
Enable notification, SMS, exact alarm, and WhatsApp automation permissions only when you use those channels.
Add a Style Coach sample so generated wishes sound closer to you.
Use AI Doctor to test AI, email, contact sync, permissions, and failed-send recovery.
Required when a contact uses Email as the preferred channel or when you send a test message to yourself.
Enter both Gmail address and app password.
Use 24-hour values. Scheduled sends should avoid this window where supported.
Quiet hours must be between 0 and 23.
Authenticate to access your relationship data.
Authenticate with biometrics or your device credential to continue.
Biometric or device credential authentication is not available. Set up a screen lock on this device, then retry.
Temporarily block channels you do not want RelateAI to use for automatic sends.
Device contacts permission is missing. Allow contacts access to import phone contacts.
Add Gmail sender details in Settings before sending a test.
Write a message before sending a test.
Could not send the test message. Check Gmail app password and network access.
%1$d contact(s) prefer Email, but Gmail sender setup is missing.
No email-preferred contacts yet. Configure Gmail only if you plan to send email wishes.
Add Gmail sender address and app password in Settings.
Email test sent to your sender address.
Email test failed. Check Gmail app password, network access, and sender address.
Use HH:mm for custom send time.
Personal notes or memory context added
Impact: the next AI wish may sound generic until this context is added.
Impact: adding this detail helps the draft mention more specific relationship context.
Impact: AI has enough context for richer wishes, while review and send remain under your control.
Add 1 memory to improve AI quality
add a nickname or close name
add a memory or personal note
